description: Platinum substage bands within a Copper stage time window (time-scoped, since Platinum is keyed by TD stage).
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH stage_window AS (SELECT CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS s_start, CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS s_end FROM featurestore:merged_copper_stage_index_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND copper_stage_num = :stage_num ORDER BY stage_start_ts LIMIT 1), base AS (SELECT CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'design' THEN 'slurry' ELSE p.substage END AS substage_label, CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) AS ts FROM featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p CROSS JOIN stage_window w WHERE p.name = :well_name AND p.datetime_fmt IS NOT NULL AND CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) BETWEEN w.s_start AND w.s_end AND p.substage IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(p.substage) <> 'na'), marked AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, CASE WHEN LAG(substage_label) OVER (ORDER BY ts) IS DISTINCT FROM substage_label THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_new_group FROM base), grouped AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, SUM(is_new_group) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS group_id FROM marked) SELECT substage_label, MIN(ts) AS start_ts, MAX(ts) AS end_ts, CASE LOWER(substage_label) WHEN 'stage_start' THEN '#5B5FC7' WHEN 'ramp_up' THEN '#D64B8B' WHEN 'slurry' THEN '#3BA66B' WHEN 'ramp_down' THEN '#D9902F' WHEN 'shut_off' THEN '#9A4C8D' WHEN 'stage_end' THEN '#4AA8B5' ELSE '#7A8496' END AS color, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM grouped GROUP BY group_id, substage_label ORDER BY MIN(ts)) q
